name: Fake Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 16 oz bag of frozen peas, thawed
1 small can of medium hot green chilis
4 tbsp your favorite salsa (or chopped tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
Much lower in fat than real guacamole. Try this recipe, you'll be surprised! Thaw the peas by placing them in a colander and running them under lukewarm tap water. To test if they're thawed, pop one into your mouth occasionally. Once thawed (it should only take 1-2 minutes), drain thoroughly and pour the peas into a blender or food processor.
Puree the peas in the blender or food processor. Place the pureed peas in a ceramic bowl and mix in the remaining ingredients. Refrigerate for several hours to let the flavors blend. Makes about 1 1/2 cups.
